title: S + get + p.p.（get 被動）

formulas.zh: 主詞 + get + 過去分詞（口語被動，強調過程、偶發或自身責任）
主詞 + get + 過去分詞 + (由...)(行為者可省略)

explanation: get被動為口語、非正式表達方式，用來替代be被動。主要強調動作過程、偶發事件或暗示主詞自身有責任。常見搭配：get hurt（受傷）、get lost（迷路）、get fired（被開除）、get caught（被抓到）。相比be被動的客觀陳述，get被動更生動、口語化，常見於日常對話與非正式寫作。注意：get後接過去分詞，與get+形容詞（become）的意思不同。

examples.eng: I got lost on the way to the museum yesterday.
examples.chi: 我昨天在去博物館的路上迷路了。

examples.eng: She got hurt while playing basketball and had to go to the hospital.
examples.chi: 她在打籃球時受傷，不得不去醫院。

examples.eng: He got fired from his job because he was always late.
examples.chi: 他因為經常遲到而被開除。

examples.eng: The students got caught cheating during the exam and faced serious consequences.
examples.chi: 學生在考試中作弊被抓到，面臨嚴重後果。

extension.tip: get被動與be被動的最大差異：get強調過程、偶發、動態，常暗示主詞參與或有責任；be被動客觀、正式、靜態陳述。在學測或正式寫作中應根據語境選用。get被動多見於口語、日記、非正式文章。

examples.test: She was hurt in the accident. vs. She got hurt in the accident.
examples.result: → was hurt（客觀陳述受傷事實）；got hurt（強調過程、偶發性更強，更口語化）

examples.test: The car was stolen yesterday. vs. His car got stolen yesterday.
examples.result: → was stolen（正式）；got stolen（口語化，暗示主詞疏於防範）

examples.test: He was promoted because of his hard work. vs. He got promoted because of his hard work.
examples.result: → was promoted（正式書寫）；got promoted（非正式、日常交談，更親切）

extension.note: 記憶訣竅：get被動=口語、動態、偶發；be被動=正式、靜態、客觀。

parts: at the train station last week, and I'm still upset about it.
exercises.sentence: My backpack got stolen at the train station last week, and I'm still upset about it to this day.
exercises.translation: 我的背包上週在火車站被偷，到今天我仍然很難過。

parts: during the soccer match and had to sit on the bench for the rest of the game.
exercises.sentence: She got injured during the soccer match and had to sit on the bench for the rest of the game.
exercises.translation: 她在足球比賽中受傷，不得不在替補席坐完剩下的比賽。

parts: in the old city because the map was unclear and confusing.
exercises.sentence: The tourists got lost in the old city because the map was unclear and confusing.
exercises.translation: 遊客在古城迷路了，因為地圖不清楚且令人困惑。

parts: for plagiarism in their research papers and
exercises.sentence: Several students got caught for plagiarism in their research papers and got expelled from the program.
exercises.translation: 幾名學生因論文抄襲被抓住，並被逐出課程。

vocab_table_label: 常用 get 被動片語

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的get被動句型，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: I _______ lost in the city and couldn't find my way home.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「got」。此句使用get被動句型「get + p.p.」，表示「迷路」這個偶發事件。B「was lost」為be被動，較正式但不夠口語；C「became」後接形容詞表示「變成」，不是被動；D「turned」無此用法。get被動更能強調偶發事件和動作過程。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入正確的get被動形式，表達被開除的情況
mc_exercises.question_eng: Tom was late to work three times, so he _______ fired by his boss.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B「got」。根據前文「was late」的過去式，需用過去式「got fired」。A「was get」文法錯誤，get被動不可與be並用；C「gets」為現在式，與前文時態不符；D「will be gotten」形式不當，get被動無此形式。got fired表達「被開除」的口語說法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成句子，表示在籃球比賽中受傷的情況
mc_exercises.question_eng: Sarah _______ hurt while playing basketball and had to go to the hospital immediately.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B「got hurt」。get被動「get + p.p.」特別適合表達偶發傷害事件，強調過程性和主詞的直接經歷。A「was injured」雖正確但較正式；C「was hurt」亦可但較客觀，不如get被動生動；D「had injured」為主動態，且時態不當。在非正式語境中，get hurt比be injured更常用。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最恰當的被動表達，完成關於偷竊被發現的句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The suspect _______ caught stealing money from the bank, and the police arrested him on the spot.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B「got caught」。此句描述突然被抓住的偶發事件，get被動「get caught」強調事件的突發性和暗示主詞自身有責任（因偷竊被抓），更符合情境。A「was being caught」為過去進行被動，表達持續過程不當；C「was caught」雖文法正確但較客觀、正式；D「had caught」為主動態，邏輯錯誤。get被動在此更能表達那瞬間被發現的戲劇感。

translation_exercises.answer: I got lost at school yesterday.
hints: 提示1：get lost 是 get 被動的常見搭配，表示發生了迷路這個狀況
提示2：注意不要寫成 I was lost（我處於迷路的狀態），get lost 強調動作過程

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他因為遲到被老師批評了。
translation_exercises.answer: He got criticized by the teacher for being late.
key_points: 介詞搭配 for being late
hints: 提示1：get 被動可以帶 by + agent 說明執行者，句型為 S + get + p.p. + by + agent
提示2：注意 criticize 的過去分詞是 criticized（兩個 i），不要漏掉第二個 i

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果你不認真讀書，你會被學校開除的。
translation_exercises.answer: If you don't study hard, you will get fired by the school.
hints: 提示1：條件句中主要子句用未來式 will + get + p.p.，從句用現在簡單式
提示2：get fired 是慣用搭配，表示被解僱或開除，比 be fired 更口語化、有警告意味

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 小王在派對上被抓到作弊，他感到很尷尬，因為所有朋友都看到了。
translation_exercises.answer: Xiaowang got caught cheating at the party, and he felt embarrassed because all his friends saw it.
key_points: get caught + Ving（接動名詞表示被抓到做某事）
hints: 提示1：get caught 後可接動名詞（cheating），表示『被抓到正在做某事』，這是 get 被動的特殊用法
提示2：注意 caught 是 catch 的過去分詞；『因為』用 because 引導原因子句，不要與 so 混淆
